title: Orthos Prime

description.canonical: Orthos Prime is an ancient Orokin martial weapon, forged from the purest Rubedo making it extremely light-weight.
description.display: 作为上古奥罗金的军用武器，欧特鲁斯 Prime 由最纯净的红化结晶制成，因而极其轻盈。
